channel.title: Magic: The Gathering – Neue Karten & Spoiler
channel.description: Automatisch generierter RSS Feed für neu gespoilerte und veröffentlichte Magic: The Gathering Karten via Scryfall.

item.title: Burst Lightning [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Burst Lightning

Manakosten: {R}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Solemn Simulacrum [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Solemn Simulacrum

Manakosten: {4}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Golem

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Munitions Enthusiast [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Munitions Enthusiast

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Creature — Klingon Warrior

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

Trample
When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Watery Grave [Star Trek]
item.description:
Watery Grave

Typ: Land — Island Swamp

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Temple Garden [Star Trek]
item.description:
Temple Garden

Typ: Land — Forest Plains

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.description:
Stomping Ground

Typ: Land — Mountain Forest

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.description:
Overgrown Tomb

({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.description:
Hallowed Fountain

Typ: Land — Plains Island

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.description:
Godless Shrine

Typ: Land — Plains Swamp

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.description:
Breeding Pool

Typ: Land — Forest Island

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.title: Blood Crypt [Star Trek]
item.description:
Blood Crypt

Typ: Land — Swamp Mountain

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Galaxy-Class [Star Trek]
item.description:
U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Galaxy-Class

Manakosten: {3}

Typ: Legendary Artifact — Spacecraft

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

Whenever one or more charge counters are put on U.S.S. Enterprise-D for the first time each turn, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.
Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 7+.)
7+ | Flying, vigilance

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Crystalline Entity [Star Trek]
item.description:
Crystalline Entity

Manakosten: {8}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Elemental

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

Flying
When this creature enters, if you cast it, destroy all nonartifact creatures.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Seven of Nine [Star Trek]
item.description:
Seven of Nine

Manakosten: {2}{U}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact Creature — Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Whenever you face a dilemma, draw a card. (You face a dilemma as you choose one or more modes for a spell or ability.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The City on the Edge of Forever [Star Trek]
item.description:
The City on the Edge of Forever

Manakosten: {3}{W}{B}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — All artifacts and creatures phase out. Create a 0/1 white Human creature token with "Permanents can't phase in." (Treat phased-out permanents and anything attached to them as though they don't exist.)
II — You draw two cards and each player loses 2 life.
III — Sacrifice a creature token. If you do, you gain 5 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain Kathryn Janeway [Star Trek]
item.description:
Captain Kathryn Janeway

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
Whenever Captain Janeway or another creature you control enters, that creature explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on the creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Amok Time [Star Trek]
item.description:
Amok Time

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Target creature you control fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.
II — You gain 3 life.
III — Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain James T. Kirk [Star Trek]
item.description:
Captain James T. Kirk

Manakosten: {2}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

Whenever Captain Kirk enters or attacks, choose one. If you have no cards in hand, choose one or more instead.
• Discard a card, then draw a card.
• Create a 1/1 red Officer creature token.
• Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Beckett Mariner, Impetuous Ensign [Star Trek]
item.description:
Beckett Mariner, Impetuous Ensign

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

First strike
Reckless Behavior — Whenever Beckett Mariner becomes tapped, put a promotion counter on her. Then if there are three or more promotion counters on her, remove those counters and she deals 2 damage to each opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Salt Vampire [Star Trek]
item.description:
Salt Vampire

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Creature — Vampire Shapeshifter

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

Lifelink
When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. If you do, that player exiles that card, then draws a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: In the Pale Moonlight [Star Trek]
item.description:
In the Pale Moonlight

Manakosten: {3}{B}{B}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice.
II — Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
III — You may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, create two 2/2 black Romulan creature tokens.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Hoshi Sato, Exolinguist [Star Trek]
item.description:
Hoshi Sato, Exolinguist

Manakosten: {4}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Federation — When Hoshi Sato enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of creature types among non-Borg creatures you control. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Highly Illogical [Star Trek]
item.description:
Highly Illogical

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Counter target spell with mana value 2 or less. If this spell was kicked, instead counter target spell.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Consider the Prime Directive [Star Trek]
item.description:
Consider the Prime Directive

Manakosten: {2}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Common

Set: Star Trek

Choose one —
• Interfere — Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
• Observe — Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Draw a card. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Set Phasers to . . . [Star Trek]
item.description:
Set Phasers to . . .

Manakosten: {W}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Common

Set: Star Trek

Choose one —
• Stun — Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
• Kill — This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking creature.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Dr. Beverly Crusher [Star Trek]
item.description:
Dr. Beverly Crusher

Manakosten: {2}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Doctor

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

If you gaining life causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Dr. Crusher.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Brad Boimler, Eager Ensign [Star Trek]
item.description:
Brad Boimler, Eager Ensign

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Lifelink
Whenever Brad Boimler becomes tapped, until end of turn, if one or more counters would be put on a permanent you control, that many plus one of each of those kinds of counters are put on that permanent instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tenacious Tosk [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Tenacious Tosk

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Creature — Tosk Rogue

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Benjamin Sisko, Besieged [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Benjamin Sisko, Besieged

Manakosten: {4}{G}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Play with the top card of your library revealed.
You may play lands and cast creature spells from the top of your library.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Klingon Strike Force [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Klingon Strike Force

Manakosten: {3}{R}{R}

Typ: Creature — Klingon Warrior

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Kirk, Enterprising Captain [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Kirk, Enterprising Captain

Manakosten: {3}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Kirk attacks while creatures you control have total power 8 or greater, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Borg Queen, Perfection Manifest [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Borg Queen, Perfection Manifest

Manakosten: {4}{B}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact Creature — Borg Noble

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Artifact creatures you control get +2/+0.
When Borg Queen enters, assimilate target creature card from an opponent's graveyard. (Put it onto the battlefield under your control with a +1/+1 counter. It's a Borg artifact creature and loses all other creature types.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bio-Asset Allocator [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Bio-Asset Allocator

Manakosten: {3}{B}{B}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Borg

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Artifact creatures you control have "Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Trelane, Squire of Gothos [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Trelane, Squire of Gothos

Manakosten: {5}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Q

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
Trelane can't be blocked.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Spock, Logical Choice [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Spock, Logical Choice

Manakosten: {3}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Vulcan Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
{T}: Draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Picard, Steadfast Captain [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Picard, Steadfast Captain

Manakosten: {4}{W}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Whenever Picard enters or attacks, put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature you control.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Operations Officer [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Operations Officer

Manakosten: {3}{W}

Typ: Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, draw a card.
Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain Kirk, Boldly Going [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Captain Kirk, Boldly Going

Manakosten: {1}{G}{W}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance
Spacecraft creatures you control get +3/+3.
Whenever Captain Kirk enters or attacks, search your library and/or graveyard for a basic land card or a card named Starship Enterprise, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sheoldred, the Apocalypse [Stardates]
item.description:
Sheoldred, the Apocalypse

Manakosten: {2}{B}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Phyrexian Praetor

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Stardates

Deathtouch
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 2 life.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, they lose 2 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Explore [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Explore

Manakosten: {1}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

You may play an additional land this turn.
Draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Fact or Fiction [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Fact or Fiction

Manakosten: {3}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Preordain [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Preordain

Manakosten: {U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Scry 2, then draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Life from the Loam [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Life from the Loam

Manakosten: {1}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Return up to three target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.
Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Treasure Cruise [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Treasure Cruise

Manakosten: {7}{U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)
Draw three cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Stingcaster Mage [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Stingcaster Mage

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Creature — Human Wizard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Haste
When this creature enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Torch of Defiance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Torch of Defiance

Manakosten: {2}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card. If you don't, Chandra deals 2 damage to each opponent.
+1: Add {R}{R}.
−3: Chandra deals 4 damage to target creature.
−7: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, this emblem deals 5 damage to any target."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Chill of Compliance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Chill of Compliance

Manakosten: {1}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Surveil 1. If you put a noncreature, nonland card into your graveyard this way, put that card into your hand.
+1: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a noncreature spell.
−X: Tap target artifact or creature. Put X stun counters on it.
−6: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, draw a card."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving

Manakosten: {1}{B} // {B}

Typ: Creature — Vampire Warlock // Instant

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of each end step, if three or more creatures died this turn, this creature becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
//
Target player draws three cards and loses 3 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Voice of Victory [Planeswalker Championship Promos]
item.description:
Voice of Victory

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Creature — Human Bard

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Planeswalker Championship Promos

Mobilize 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, create two tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature tokens. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.)
Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Strategic Betrayal [Planeswalker Championship Promos]
item.description:
Strategic Betrayal

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Planeswalker Championship Promos

Target opponent exiles a creature they control and their graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Kozilek's Command [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Kozilek's Command

Manakosten: {X}{C}{C}

Typ: Kindred Instant — Eldrazi

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

Choose two —
• Target player creates X 0/1 colorless Eldrazi Spawn creature tokens with "Sacrifice this token: Add {C}."
• Target player scries X, then draws a card.
• Exile target creature with mana value X or less.
• Exile up to X target cards from graveyards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Pinnacle Starcage [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Pinnacle Starcage

Manakosten: {1}{W}{W}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

When this artifact enters, exile all artifacts and creatures with mana value 2 or less until this artifact leaves the battlefield.
{6}{W}{W}: Put each card exiled with this artifact into its owner's graveyard, then create a 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature token for each card put into a graveyard this way. Sacrifice this artifact.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sunpearl Kirin [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Sunpearl Kirin

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Creature — Kirin

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

Flash
Flying
When this creature enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. If it was a token, draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Shuri, Wakandan Inventor [Media and Collaboration Promos]
item.description:
Shuri, Wakandan Inventor

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Artificer Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Media and Collaboration Promos

Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
{1}, {T}: Target artifact you control becomes a copy of a second target artifact you control until end of turn, except it isn't legendary. Activate only as a sorcery.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Arcane Signet [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Arcane Signet

Manakosten: {2}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The One Ring [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
The One Ring

Manakosten: {4}

Typ: Legendary Artifact

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tom Bombadil [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Tom Bombadil

Manakosten: {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — God Bard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

As long as there are four or more lore counters among Sagas you control, Tom Bombadil has hexproof and indestructible.
Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Saga card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sauron, the Dark Lord [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Sauron, the Dark Lord

Manakosten: {3}{U}{B}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Avatar Horror

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Ward—Sacrifice a legendary artifact or legendary creature.
Whenever an opponent casts a spell, amass Orcs 1.
Whenever an Army you control deals combat damage to a player, the Ring tempts you.
Whenever the Ring tempts you, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw four cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Forest [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Forest

Typ: Basic Land — Forest

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {G}.)

item.description:

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {R}.)

item.description:

Typ: Basic Land — Swamp

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {B}.)

Typ: Basic Land — Island

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {U}.)

item.title: Plains [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Plains

Typ: Basic Land — Plains

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {W}.)

item.title: My Precious // Allure of Power [The Hobbit]
item.description:
My Precious // Allure of Power

Manakosten: {3} // {1}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact — Equipment // Instant — Adventure

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

Equipped creature has hexproof and can't be blocked.
Equip—{2}, Pay 2 life.
//
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Draw two cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The Arkenstone // Seek the Heart [The Hobbit]
item.description:
The Arkenstone // Seek the Heart

Manakosten: {5} // {2}{W}

Typ: Legendary Artifact // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Creatures you control get +1/+1.
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card.
//
Search your library for a legendary creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Then exile this card. You may cast the artifact later from exile.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tom, Bert, and William [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Tom, Bert, and William

Manakosten: {3}{B}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Troll

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

{1}, Sacrifice another creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then discard a card.
When Tom, Bert, and William die, if they were a creature, return them to the battlefield. They're an artifact. (They're no longer a creature.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Wood Elves [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Wood Elves

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Thorin, Mountain-king [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Thorin, Mountain-king

Manakosten: {3}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Dwarf Noble

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Trample
When Thorin enters, attach any number of target Equipment you control to target creature you control. When one or more Equipment become attached to that creature this way, that creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Smaug the Magnificent [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Smaug the Magnificent

Manakosten: {2}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Dragon

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Flying, haste
Whenever Smaug attacks, he deals damage equal to the number of Treasures you control to any target.
At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Treasure token.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Riddles in the Dark [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Riddles in the Dark

Manakosten: {2}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

Look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. An opponent chooses one of the piles. Put that pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bilbo, Thief in the Night [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Bilbo, Thief in the Night

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Halfling Rogue

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast.
Whenever Bilbo attacks, you may cast an artifact, instant, or sorcery spell from your graveyard. If an instant or sorcery spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bilbo, Luckwearer // Burglar's Plot [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Bilbo, Luckwearer // Burglar's Plot

Manakosten: {1}{U} // {4}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Halfling Rogue // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: The Hobbit

Bilbo can't be blocked.
Whenever Bilbo deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.
//
Exchange control of two target nonland permanents that share a card type. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: An Unexpected Party // At the Door [The Hobbit]
item.description:
An Unexpected Party // At the Door

Manakosten: {2}{W}{W} // {X}{2}{W}

Typ: Enchantment // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +2/+2.
//
Create X 2/2 red Dwarf creature tokens. (Then exile this card. You may cast the enchantment later from exile.)

item.title: Path of Ancestry [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Path of Ancestry

Typ: Land

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.description:
Sol Ring

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

item.title: Coat of Arms [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Coat of Arms

Manakosten: {5}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Each creature gets +1/+1 for each other creature on the battlefield that shares at least one creature type with it. (For example, if two Goblin Warriors and a Goblin Shaman are on the battlefield, each gets +2/+2.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Lathril, Blade of the Elves [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Lathril, Blade of the Elves

Manakosten: {2}{B}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elf Noble

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Lathril deals combat damage to a player, create that many 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens.
{T}, Tap ten untapped Elves you control: Each opponent loses 10 life and you gain 10 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Finale of Devastation [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Finale of Devastation

Manakosten: {X}{G}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If X is 10 or more, creatures you control get +X/+X and gain haste until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Cultivate [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Cultivate

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

item.description:
Baxter Building

Typ: Land

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Add four mana in any combination of colors.
{4}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you control a creature with toughness 4 or greater.

item.title: Tippy-Toe, Terrific Partner [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Tippy-Toe, Terrific Partner

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Squirrel Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

If you would create one or more tokens, instead create those tokens plus an additional Food token.
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, draw a card.

item.title: Hex Magic [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Hex Magic

Manakosten: {2}{R}

Typ: Sorcery — Arcane

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Exile all the cards from your hand, then draw that many cards. Until the end of your next turn, you may play cards exiled this way.

Seltenheit: Rare

Haste

item.description:
Quicksilver, Brash Blur

Manakosten: {R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Mutant Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Pro Tour Promos

If Quicksilver, Brash Blur is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with him on the battlefield.
Haste
Power-up — {4}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a double strike counter on Quicksilver. (Activate each power-up ability only once. Reduce the cost by his mana cost if he entered this turn.)

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elemental

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

When Titania enters, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

item.title: Tireless Provisioner [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Tireless Provisioner

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token or a Treasure token. (Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life." Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Six [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Six

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Treefolk

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Reach
Whenever Six attacks, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.
During your turn, nonland permanent cards in your graveyard have retrace. (You may cast permanent cards from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying their other costs.)

item.description:

item.title: Nissa, Resurgent Animist [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Nissa, Resurgent Animist

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, add one mana of any color. Then if this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an Elf or Elemental card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
